description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Priority Gauge</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>-10%</color>를 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>-10%</color>DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>降低<color=#28d9ed>-10%</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Priority Gauge</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>-10%</color>를 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>-10%</color>DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>降低<color=#28d9ed>-10%</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Priority Gauge</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>-10%</color>를 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>-10%</color>DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>降低<color=#28d9ed>-10%</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nRecovers Health of the caster by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> every time the caster takes a turn.
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n자신의 턴마다 자신의 체력을 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 만큼 회복합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n自分のターンが来るたびに、自分のHPを<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>回復する。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n每到自身回合时,使自身生命值恢复<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nHas a <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> chance to grant an <color=#28d9ed>extra turn</color> at the end of the turn.
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n턴 종료 시 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>추가 턴</color>을 획득합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\nターン終了時<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>追加ターン</color>を獲得する。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n回合结束时,有<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>的几率获得<color=#28d9ed>额外回合</color>。
